title: Good Indices in a Digit String
titleCn: 数字字符串中的好索引

detail.title: Good Indices in a Digit String
hints: For an index i, any valid substring must end exactly at position i.
The substring you are looking for is determined by the decimal digits of i.
For each index i, compare the string form of i with the substring that ends at i and has the same length.
